name: Align operator identity and Herdr work-session topology

elements.name: Alignment complete
elements.documentation: Begin from the operator-aligned identity and Herdr topology outcome.

elements.name: Approve identity and work-session plan
elements.documentation: The operator reviews the final rendered plan before implementation begins.

elements.name: Plan approved?
elements.documentation: Implementation proceeds only after the operator confirms the complete scope and flow.

elements.name: Return to alignment
elements.documentation: A rejected or materially changed plan returns to operator alignment without implementation.

elements.name: Configure qqp-dev Git identity
elements.documentation: Set the active global Git name and established GitHub noreply address without rewriting prior history.

elements.name: Replace current legacy identity references
elements.documentation: Update current managed qq references and verify deciq contains no current legacy handle.

elements.name: Verify active and tracked identity
elements.documentation: Check global authorship, current tracked content in both repositories, and the no-history-rewrite boundary.

elements.name: Identity correct?
elements.documentation: Stop if active authorship or any current tracked reference still uses the former identity.

elements.name: Identity check failed
elements.documentation: Do not continue while identity evidence is incomplete or implies history rewriting.

elements.name: Encode persistent project homes
elements.documentation: Define the sole main-checkout Herdr home, its dedicated Backlog-board tab, and its operator-owned general tabs.

elements.name: Encode grouped worktree sessions
elements.documentation: Create or open each Change worktree from its project home, give the work session a unique operator-agreed change label matching [A-Za-z0-9-]{1,15}, and move the current accountable conversation there before mutation.

elements.name: Focus home board without retiring work
elements.documentation: After terminal disposition, keep the worktree session intact and focus the synchronized main home's unique Backlog board.

elements.name: Place reviewers and researchers to the right
elements.documentation: Make fresh read-only reviewer and researcher agents no-focus right splits in the owning work session, with an explicit non-Herdr fallback.

elements.name: Add focused lifecycle checks
elements.documentation: Cover home discovery, grouped session entry and short unique labeling, delegate placement, board focus, preservation, and identity invariants.

elements.name: Run or rerun checks
elements.documentation: Join the initial and repaired paths before executing the same focused Check set.

elements.name: Run focused automated checks
elements.documentation: Execute the checks that observe the exact changed workflow and diff hygiene.

elements.name: Automated checks green?
elements.documentation: Repair only in-scope failures and rerun the affected checks until green.

elements.name: Repair in-scope check failures
elements.documentation: Apply the smallest causal correction inside the approved responsibility boundary.

elements.name: Exercise live home and work-session topology
elements.documentation: Verify qq and deciq homes remain on main, their child work sessions use the approved short labels, the current qq work session stays grouped and intact, and no unrelated session moves.

elements.name: Live topology safe?
elements.documentation: Stop if a home leaves main, a work session label is duplicate, unapproved, or fails [A-Za-z0-9-]{1,15}, the session is moved or removed, the board is not focused, or another live session changes.

elements.name: Live topology check failed
elements.documentation: Preserve all live sessions and return for correction or operator realignment.

elements.name: Accept home and work-session behavior
elements.documentation: The operator confirms the persistent home, short recognizable work-session labels, right-split delegation, and board-return experience.

elements.name: Operator accepts behavior?
elements.documentation: A rejected experience returns to alignment rather than being declared complete.

elements.name: Return for experience correction
elements.documentation: Do not hand off a Change the operator has not accepted.

elements.name: Complete qq Change delivery
elements.documentation: Invoke the inherited reviewed, checked, finalized, one-PR delivery procedure.

elements.name: Green PR ready
elements.documentation: End at the reviewed green pull-request handoff boundary.
